transfer.trash: Moved {countText} {count, plural, one {file} other {files}} to trash

@transfer.trash.description: Toast after moving items to the system trash. {countText} is the preformatted file count (locale-grouped); {count} is the raw integer for plural selection.

@transfer.delete.description: Toast after a permanent delete. {countText} preformatted count, {count} raw integer for plural selection.

transfer.movedPhrase: {kind, select, both {{filesText} {files, plural, one {file} other {files}} and {foldersText} {folders, plural, one {folder} other {folders}}} foldersOnly {{foldersText} {folders, plural, one {folder} other {folders}}} other {{filesText} {files, plural, one {file} other {files}}}}

@transfer.movedPhrase.description: The 'N files and M folders' phrase, omitting the zero part. {kind} discriminates both/filesOnly/foldersOnly so independent plural branches never emit a dangling ' and '. *Text params are preformatted counts; raw {files}/{folders} drive plural selection only.

@transfer.split.clean.description: Copy/move success with a per-type split and no skips. {phrase} is the already-rendered transfer.movedPhrase result.

transfer.split.skipped: {verb, select, copy {Copied} other {Moved}} {phrase}, skipped {skippedText} {skipped, plural, one {file} other {files}} (already at the target).

@transfer.split.skipped.description: Copy/move success with a per-type split plus a skipped-files suffix. {phrase} is transfer.movedPhrase; {skippedText} preformatted, {skipped} raw for plural.

transfer.fileOnly.allDone: {verb, select, copy {Copy} other {Move}} complete: {verb, select, copy {copied} other {moved}} {transferredText} {transferred, plural, one {file} other {files}}.

@transfer.fileOnly.allDone.description: File-count-only wording (clipboard paste, no per-type split), everything transferred, nothing skipped.

transfer.fileOnly.allSkippedSingle: {verb, select, copy {Copy} other {Move}} complete: file already at the target, not {verb, select, copy {copied} other {moved}}.

@transfer.fileOnly.allSkippedSingle.description: File-count-only wording, a single file that was already at the target (nothing transferred).

transfer.fileOnly.allSkippedMany: {verb, select, copy {Copy} other {Move}} complete: skipped all {skippedText} files (already at the target), nothing was {verb, select, copy {copied} other {moved}}.

@transfer.fileOnly.allSkippedMany.description: File-count-only wording, every file (2+) was already at the target (nothing transferred).

transfer.fileOnly.mixedCopy: Copy complete: copied {transferredText}, skipped {skippedText}. All {processedText} of your selected {processed, plural, one {file} other {files}} are now at the target.

@transfer.fileOnly.mixedCopy.description: File-count-only copy wording, some copied and some skipped. Copy phrasing reassures all selected files are now present.

transfer.fileOnly.mixedMove: Move complete: moved {transferredText}, skipped {skippedText}. {skippedText} {skipped, plural, one {file} other {files}} {skipped, plural, one {was} other {were}} already at the target.

@transfer.fileOnly.mixedMove.description: File-count-only move wording, some moved and some skipped. Move phrasing reports the skipped files were already at the target, with was/were agreement.
